title: Timer Plugin
description: A plugin that sets up a world border timer
body:
🌍 TimerPlugin
TimerBorder is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that starts a countdown and automatically shrinks the world border when the timer ends — perfect for UHCs, custom survival challenges, or intense minigames.

🔧 Features
⏳ Custom Timer: Start a countdown using /timer <worldborder size> <mm:ss>
→ Example: /timer 1000 05:00 will shrink the world border to 1000 blocks after 5 minutes.

🌐 Border Control: Once the countdown ends, the world border shrinks to your specified size over the same duration.

📢 Visual Countdown: Players see a live actionbar countdown every second with a title and sound to keep the intensity high.

🔊 Audible Alerts: Subtle ticking using note block sounds helps players stay aware of the time pressure.

📦 Usage
Command: 
/timer <worldborder size> <mm:ss>

Example:
/timer 1500 10:30
→ Starts a 10-minute 30-second countdown. At the end, the worldborder will shrink to 1500 blocks over the same 630 seconds.

✅ Compatibility
Minecraft Versions: 1.21+

Server: Paper / Spigot
